signs.desc: Indicates that all previously indicated road restrictions or speed limits are now lifted.

signs.ur: رفتار کی تمام پابندیاں ختم ہیں
signs.desc: Indicates that any previously enforced speed limit restrictions have ended.
Indicates a compulsory rule or action that must be followed by all drivers.
Requires drivers to stop for customs clearance or police inspection.
Entry of bicycles or non-motorized cycles is strictly prohibited past this point.

signs.ur: دہری سڑک شروع ہو رہی ہے
signs.desc: Indicates the start of a divided highway where opposing traffic is separated by a median.

signs.ur: دہری سڑک ختم ہو رہی ہے
signs.desc: Indicates that the dual carriageway is ending and traffic transitions back to a two-way single road.

signs.ur: 8.6 فٹ سے زیادہ اونچی گاڑیوں کا داخلہ ممنوع ہے
signs.en: Entry Of Vehicles Higher Than 8.6 Feet Is Prohibited
signs.desc: Restricts vehicles exceeding a total height limit of 8.6 feet from passing through.

signs.ur: 9 میٹر سے زیادہ لمبی گاڑیوں کا داخلہ ممنوع ہے
signs.en: Entry Of Vehicles Longer Than 9 Meters Is Prohibited
signs.desc: Prohibits vehicles or vehicle combinations exceeding 9 meters in length from using this road.

signs.ur: 8.6 فٹ سے زیادہ چوڑی گاڑیوں کا داخلہ ممنوع ہے
signs.en: Entry Of Vehicles Wider Than 8.6 Feet Is Prohibited
signs.desc: Restricts vehicles exceeding a total width of 8.6 feet to prevent narrow-passage blockages.
Mandatory direction to move forward only. Turns to the left or right are forbidden.

signs.ur: سیدھے جانا یا بائیں مڑنا لازمی ہے
signs.en: Going Straight Or Left Is Allowed
signs.desc: Indicates that you may either go straight ahead or turn left at the upcoming junction.

signs.ur: سیدھے جانا یا دائیں مڑنا لازمی ہے
signs.en: Going Straight Or Right Is Allowed
signs.desc: Indicates that you are only allowed to proceed straight or make a right turn.
Prohibits the passage of hand-pulled or manually operated pushcarts on this route.
Indicates a silent zone (near hospitals or schools) where honking or using sirens is illegal.
Mandates drivers to keep to specific designated lanes corresponding to their vehicle type or direction.

signs.ur: لوڈر یا مال بردار گاڑیوں کا داخلہ ممنوع ہے
signs.desc: Prohibits commercial cargo, goods carriers, and commercial loader trucks from passing.

signs.ur: گول چکر - بائیں طرف سے چکر کاٹیں
signs.desc: Requires traffic to yield and enter the roundabout in a clock-wise direction following standard entry laws.

signs.ur: موٹر سائیکلوں کا داخلہ ممنوع ہے
signs.desc: Prohibits two-wheelers or motorized motorcycles from entering this designated section of road.
Indicates that specific area restrictions have ended, and default state speed regulations are back in force.

signs.ur: تانگوں اور ریڑھیوں کا داخلہ ممنوع ہے
signs.en: No Entry For Animal Drawn Vehicles
signs.desc: Restricts horse-drawn carts, bullock carts, and animal-drawn carriages from entering.

signs.ur: تمام گاڑیوں کا داخلہ ممنوع ہے
signs.desc: Prohibits the passage of all motorized vehicles from entering this direction of the road.
Do not enter this lane or road. Typically placed at exit ends of one-way routes.

signs.ur: بھاری مال بردار گاڑیوں کے اوور ٹیکنگ ممنوع ہے
signs.en: No Overtaking For Heavy Goods Vehicles
signs.desc: Restricts heavy multi-axle freight trucks from changing lanes to overtake slow-moving vehicles.
Indicates that you may drop off or pick up passengers briefly, but parking vehicles is strictly prohibited.
Do not attempt to pass or overtake any vehicle ahead on this segment of the road.

signs.ur: اوور ٹیکنگ پر لگی پابندی ختم ہے
signs.desc: Indicates that the previous prohibition on overtaking has ended, allowing passing when safe.
Mandates vehicles to slow down and come to a complete stop for standard security checking.
All traffic is blocked from moving forward due to obstructions, security, or permanent closures.
Requires drivers to reduce vehicle speed immediately to adjust to upcoming hazardous road hazards.
Indicates the maximum permissible driving speed. Exceeding this numerical value is an offense.
Mandates that drivers must keep their vehicles on the left lane or left side of the divider.
Mandates that drivers must keep their vehicles to the right lane or right side of the divider.
Requires a complete stop behind the stop line. Yield to crossing intersection traffic before moving.
Mandatory instruction requiring all traveling vehicles to make a left turn at this intersection.
Mandatory instruction requiring all traveling vehicles to make a right turn at this intersection.
Do not execute a 180-degree turn to travel in the opposite direction. Extremely dangerous point.

signs.ur: 7 ٹن سے زیادہ وزنی گاڑیوں کا داخلہ ممنوع ہے
signs.en: Vehicles With More Than 7 Tons Weight Are Prohibited
signs.desc: Prohibits any vehicles exceeding a gross weight of 7 tons from entering to protect pavement structures.
Provides structural directions and route numbers ahead of an approaching highway junction.
Do not enter the boxed intersection unless your exit path is completely clear.
Designates an area set aside for transit buses to stop, board, or discharge passengers.

signs.ur: آنے والے چوک پر مناسب لین کا انتخاب کریں
signs.en: Choose Appropriate Lanes At Upcoming Intersection
signs.desc: Advises lane assignment configurations depending on the route choice at the junction ahead.

signs.ur: بغیر رکے اس لائن کو پار کرنا ممنوع ہے
signs.en: Crossing This Line Without Stopping Is Prohibited
signs.desc: A regulatory white stop bar warning that you cannot roll through without a complete stop.
Advisory informative support warning of sharp and difficult bends ahead.

signs.ur: رکنا ممنوع ہے - سڑک کو صاف رکھیں
signs.en: Do Not Stop - Keep Road Clear
signs.desc: Prohibits standing or stopping at any time to preserve smooth traffic flows.
Informs travelers of public conveniences, parking structures, or recreational service options.
Indicates availability of emergency first-aid or outpatient medical clinics nearby.
Slow down and grant traffic on the major crossing route the right-of-way.
Indicates that the route is clear and drivers are permitted to proceed safely.
Hospital emergency facility ahead. Drivers must maintain silence and refrain from honking.
Indicates the availability of overnight boarding services or motels.
Provides geographic directions, lane configurations, or general assistance details.
Outlines structural traffic rules on changing lanes and utilizing directional bypass links.
Alerts that a traffic lane is closed ahead. Merge safely into the neighboring open lane.
Indicates traffic is authorized to move strictly in one direction only. Do not turn against flow.
Alerts that traffic exiting to the left joins a strictly one-way thoroughfare.
Alerts that traffic exiting to the right joins a strictly one-way thoroughfare.

signs.ur: اوور ٹیکنگ کی اجازت ہے اگر سامنے سے کوئی گاڑی نہ آ رہی ہو
signs.en: Overtaking Allowed If Road Clear Ahead
signs.desc: Passing is permitted using the opposing lane under the condition that visibility is clear.
Designates authorized parking zones situated on the left shoulder of the road.
Designates authorized parking zones situated on the right shoulder of the road.
Leaving vehicles unoccupied or standing at this site is illegal and subject to towing.
Indicates proximity of a refueling station or fuel pumps on or near the main road.
Informs motorists of food services and dining options accessible along this route.
Warns of a dead-end street or complete permanent road closure a short distance ahead.

signs.ur: رکنے کے لیے رفتار آہستہ کریں
signs.desc: Indicates an imminent mandatory stop requirement. Prepare to brake smoothly.
Indicates entry onto high-speed controlled access motorway. Standard speed and vehicle limits apply.
A white transverse stop bar painted on the road showing where vehicles must stop behind.
Indicates the mandatory point where your vehicle must come to a halt.

signs.ur: سڑک پر گاڑی روکنا ممنوع ہے
signs.desc: Stopping, parking, or leaving a car standing on this active carriageway is forbidden.
Informs travelers of an emergency or public telephone installation near the roadside.

signs.ur: بائیں طرف جانے والی سڑک بند ہے
signs.desc: Indicates that the branch or side street exiting to your left is closed or blocked.

signs.ur: دائیں طرف جانے والی سڑک بند ہے
signs.desc: Indicates that the branch or side street exiting to your right is closed or blocked.
Informs that drivers must turn to the left. Going straight or turning right is not permitted.
Informs that drivers must turn to the right. Going straight or turning left is not permitted.
Indicates presence of vehicle repair workshop or mechanic facilities nearby.
Indicates presence of crosswalk lines designated for pedestrian street crossing.

signs.ur: بائیں طرف سے چھوٹی سڑک مل رہی ہے
signs.en: Minor Road Merging From Left Side
signs.desc: Warns of merging traffic entering from a side road on the left side of your lane.

signs.ur: دائیں طرف سے چھوٹی سڑک مل رہی ہے
signs.en: Minor Road Merging From Right Side
signs.desc: Warns of merging traffic entering from a side road on the right side of your lane.

signs.ur: ہوائی اڈہ - کم اونچائی پر اڑتے جہاز
signs.desc: Warns of sudden loud noise or distractions due to aircraft landing or takeoff paths crossing overhead.

signs.ur: سڑک آگے سے تنگ ہو رہی ہے
signs.desc: Alerts that the width of the carriageway ahead is significantly reducing.

signs.ur: بچوں کے گزرنے کی جگہ / اسکول
signs.desc: Near school or playground. Slow down and watch carefully for children crossing the street.

signs.ur: سائیکل سواروں کا راستہ آگے ہے
signs.desc: Warns of bicycle riders crossing or riding near the main road lanes ahead.
Warns drivers to expect cyclists crossing the roadway in front.
Warns of unspecified hazardous road structures or unsafe conditions ahead.
Alerts drivers to a sudden dip or depression on the road surface ahead.
Warns of a sequence of sharp turns ahead, starting with a bend to the right.
Steep downhill descent. Use a lower gear to safely regulate braking and vehicle speed.
Warns of a sequence of sharp turns ahead, starting with a bend to the left.
Alerts that traffic flow is controlled by an electrical traffic signal structure ahead.
Approach cautiously. Prepare to stop or yield entirely to opposing highway traffic.

signs.ur: اگلے چوک پر دائیں طرف کے ٹریفک کو راستہ دیں
signs.en: Give Way To Traffic From Right At Intersection
signs.desc: Yield to vehicles approaching the junction from your right side.
Warns of a severe and sharp bend in the road towards the left side.
Alerts to train tracks ahead without an automated crossing gate. Stop, look, and listen.
Loose stones on road surface. Keep safe distances to avoid windscreen chips and loss of traction.
Alerts to an upcoming narrow bridge structure. Slow down and check for opposing vehicles.
Warns of hazards not covered by standard warning symbols. Proceed with caution.

signs.ur: پیدل چلنے والوں کے گزرنے کی جگہ
signs.desc: Yield to pedestrians crossing the roadway at this upcoming marked zone.
Warns of dynamic road hazards requiring alertness and speed adjustment.
Alerts that train tracks ahead are secured with an automated protective gate or barrier.
Warns of a severe and sharp bend in the road towards the right side.

signs.ur: پہاڑی چٹانیں گرنے کا خطرہ ہے
signs.desc: Alerts to active landslides or falling rock zones. Do not park on this road stretch.
Warns drivers that cattle or livestock may be crossing the roadway without warning.

signs.ur: سروس روڈ پہلے دائیں پھر بائیں سے مل رہی ہے
signs.desc: Warns of dual service lanes joining the highway, first from the right, then from the left.
Traction may be reduced when wet. Slow down and avoid sudden steering or braking maneuvers.

signs.ur: کچی پٹڑی یا مٹی کا کنارہ ہے
signs.desc: The dirt shoulder on the side of the paved roadway is soft. Avoid driving onto it.

signs.ur: تیز آندھی یا ہوا چل رہی ہے
signs.desc: High wind gusts. Grip the steering wheel firmly, especially when driving high-sided vehicles.
Alerts to a dynamic bridge that may pivot or open to allow watercraft to pass.

signs.ur: سڑک بائیں طرف سے نکل رہی ہے
signs.desc: Warns of a slip road or exit point peeling off to the right.

signs.ur: چھوٹی سڑک بڑی سڑک کو عبور کر رہی ہے
signs.desc: Warns of an upcoming intersection where a minor crossroad cuts through the major highway.

signs.ur: چھوٹی سڑک بائیں طرف سے مل رہی ہے
signs.en: Minor Road Joining From Left Side
signs.desc: Warns that traffic from the left side will merge or enter into the main lane ahead.

signs.ur: چھوٹی سڑک دائیں طرف سے مل رہی ہے
signs.en: Minor Road Joining From Right Side
signs.desc: Warns that traffic from the right side will merge or enter into the main lane ahead.

signs.ur: چھوٹی سڑک سامنے سے بڑی سڑک سے مل رہی ہے
signs.desc: Warns of a junction ahead where a minor lane intersects directly ahead of traffic.
The one-way street or divided highway transitions into an undivided, two-way street.
Alerts that a structured lane to perform a safe U-turn is located a short distance ahead.
Road surface is bumpy, loose, or deteriorated. Slow down to avoid damage to suspension.
Alerts to immediate bumps or hazardous road surfaces.
Steep upward climb. Select appropriate lower driving gears to maintain climb power.

signs.ur: جنگلی جانوروں کے گزرنے کی جگہ
signs.desc: Alerts to forest zones where deer, wild boar, or native wildlife may cross the road.
Alerts to active construction crews, road maintenance, or heavy equipment ahead. Drive slowly.

scenarios.question_en: Vehicle A is inside the roundabout, and Vehicle B is waiting to enter. Who has the right of way?
scenarios.question_ur: گاڑی A گول چکر کے اندر ہے اور گاڑی B داخل ہونے کا انتظار کر رہی ہے۔ پہلے گزرنے کا حق کس کا ہے؟

options.en: Vehicle A has priority; vehicles entering must yield to traffic already in the roundabout.
options.ur: گاڑی A کو پہل حاصل ہے؛ داخل ہونے والی گاڑیوں کو پہلے سے موجود ٹریفک کو راستہ دینا ہوگا۔

options.en: Vehicle B has priority because it is entering from the left lane.
options.ur: گاڑی B کو پہل حاصل ہے کیونکہ وہ بائیں لین سے داخل ہو رہی ہے۔

options.en: Both can enter simultaneously without slowing down.
options.ur: دونوں گاڑیاں رفتار کم کیے بغیر بیک وقت داخل ہو سکتی ہیں۔

scenarios.question_en: Your exit lane is blocked but the traffic light is green. Are you allowed to enter the yellow box junction?
scenarios.question_ur: آپ کا باہر نکلنے والا راستہ بند ہے لیکن اشارہ سبز ہے۔ کیا آپ کو پیلے بکس چوک میں داخل ہونے کی اجازت ہے؟

options.en: No, you must wait behind the line until your exit is clear to avoid blocking the intersection.
options.ur: نہیں، چوک بلاک ہونے سے بچانے کے لیے آپ کو باہر کا راستہ صاف ہونے تک لکیر کے پیچھے انتظار کرنا ہوگا۔

options.en: Yes, a green signal always gives you permission to proceed.
options.ur: ہاں، سبز اشارہ ہمیشہ آگے بڑھنے کی اجازت دیتا ہے۔

options.en: Yes, but only if you continuously honk to warn other traffic.
options.ur: ہاں، لیکن صرف اس صورت میں جب آپ دوسرے ٹریفک کو متنبہ کرنے کے لیے مسلسل ہارن بجائیں۔

scenarios.question_en: Are you allowed to cross a solid white double center line on a road to overtake another vehicle?
scenarios.question_ur: کیا آپ کو کسی دوسری گاڑی کو اوور ٹیک کرنے کے لیے سڑک پر موجود دہری ٹھوس سفید لکیر کو پار کرنے کی اجازت ہے؟

options.en: No, crossing double solid lines is strictly prohibited except for avoiding an obstruction.
options.ur: نہیں، دہری ٹھوس لکیروں کو پار کرنا سخت ممنوع ہے سوائے کسی بڑی رکاوٹ سے بچنے کے۔

options.en: Yes, if there is no oncoming traffic visible ahead.
options.ur: ہاں، اگر سامنے سے کوئی ٹریفک آتی دکھائی نہ دے رہی ہو۔

options.en: Yes, but only during daylight hours.
options.ur: ہاں، لیکن صرف دن کے اوقات میں۔

scenarios.question_en: When driving in dense fog on highways or motorways, which lights should you keep switched on?
scenarios.question_ur: ہائی ویز یا موٹرویز پر شدید دھند میں گاڑی چلاتے وقت، آپ کو کون سی لائٹس آن رکھنی چاہئیں؟

options.en: Low-beam headlights along with dedicated front and rear fog lights.
options.ur: لو بیم ہیڈلائٹس کے ساتھ مخصوص اگلی اور پچھلی فوگ لائٹس۔

options.en: High-beam headlights to pierce through the heavy fog.
options.ur: ہائی بیم ہیڈلائٹس تاکہ گھنی دھند کو واضح طور پر دیکھا جا سکے۔

options.en: Hazard warning lights continuously while traveling at high speeds.
options.ur: تیز رفتاری سے سفر کرتے ہوئے مسلسل ایمرجنسی (ہیزرڈ) لائٹس۔

scenarios.question_en: At an unmarked intersection with equal road size, which vehicle has the right of way?
scenarios.question_ur: مساوی سڑک کے بغیر نشان والے چوک پر، کس گاڑی کو پہلے گزرنے کا حق حاصل ہوتا ہے؟

options.en: The vehicle coming from your right side.
options.ur: وہ گاڑی جو آپ کے دائیں طرف سے آ رہی ہو۔

options.en: The vehicle moving at the highest speed.
options.ur: وہ گاڑی جو سب سے زیادہ رفتار سے چل رہی ہو۔

options.en: The vehicle arriving from the left side.
options.ur: وہ گاڑی جو بائیں طرف سے آ رہی ہو۔
